from dbt_optimizer.models import DbtModel

print\('effective_sql:', m.effective_sql\)
print\('upstream:', m.upstream_models\)
print\('downstream:', m.downstream_models\)
m.compiled_sql = 'SELECT id FROM orders'
print\('effective_sql after MCP:', m.effective_sql\)
